sentences.text: Thank you for calling real estate associates. You're receiving this message during normal business hours monday through friday nine o'clock A. M. To five o'clock P. M. Our staff is currently assisting other callers. Please try your call again later following menu options. To direct your call. Please note the following menu options have changed. If you know the extension of the party you're trying to reach, you may dial it now. For maintenance request on residential properties, press one. If you're experiencing a life threatening emergency or safety concern. Hang up and call nine hundred and eleven for maintenance requests on commercial properties, press two. To reach our residential rental department including inquiries for available homes or apartments, press three. To reach our commercial brokerage department including retail, office industrial or land available. For sale or lease press four. For all other inquiries please press five. To repeat this menu, press the star key. This key is not valid. Please try again please note the following menu options have changed. If you know the extension of the party you're trying to reach, you may dial it now. For maintenance request on residential properties, press one. If you're experiencing a life threatening emergency or safety concern. Hang up and call nine hundred and eleven for maintenance requests on commercial properties, press two. To reach our residential rental department including inquiries for available homes or apartments, press three. To reach our commercial brokerage department including retail office industrial or land available. For sale or lease, press four. For
all other inquiries please press five to repeat this menu, press the star key. Your call cannot be transferred. Please try again later. Thank you.

conversation.title: Call: Brandon Winfield and Marcy Brennan @ Real Estate Associates, Inc.
